message:
feat(teams): connector runtime, manifest, and operations (j05nu.1.6.4)

Complete V3 connector surface for Microsoft Teams:
- connector.rs: FcpConnector impl with configure (3 auth modes),
  handshake, health, self_check, doctor diagnostics, simulate,
  introspect (8 operations), invoke dispatch, and shutdown
- manifest.toml: graph.microsoft.com network constraints, strict
  sandbox profile, provisioning notes for Azure AD permissions
- main.rs: Full JSON-RPC stdio loop matching WhatsApp pattern
- 8 typed operations: list_teams, get_team, list_channels,
  get_channel, send_channel_message, list_chats, send_chat_message,
  list_chat_messages — all with AI hints, safety/risk classification
- 73 tests across types (20), error (24), client (12), connector (17)
  All clippy clean, wiremock-based, no real API calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,130 @@
+[connector]
+name = "fcp.teams"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "Microsoft Teams connector (Graph API + Bot Framework)"
+archetype = "bidirectional"
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:work"
+allowed_sources = ["z:work", "z:project:*"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:work", "z:project:*"]
+tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-work"
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.dns", "network.outbound"]
+forbidden = ["system.exec", "system.privileged"]
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_limit_mb = 64
+cpu_limit_percent = 25
+wall_clock_timeout_s = 30
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true
+
+[[operations]]
+id = "teams.list_teams"
+[operations.network]
+host_allow = ["graph.microsoft.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[[operations]]
+id = "teams.get_team"
+[operations.network]
+host_allow = ["graph.microsoft.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[[operations]]
+id = "teams.list_channels"
+[operations.network]
+host_allow = ["graph.microsoft.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[[operations]]
+id = "teams.get_channel"
+[operations.network]
+host_allow = ["graph.microsoft.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[[operations]]
+id = "teams.send_channel_message"
+[operations.network]
+host_allow = ["graph.microsoft.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[[operations]]
+id = "teams.list_chats"
+[operations.network]
+host_allow = ["graph.microsoft.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[[operations]]
+id = "teams.send_chat_message"
+[operations.network]
+host_allow = ["graph.microsoft.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[[operations]]
+id = "teams.list_chat_messages"
+[operations.network]
+host_allow = ["graph.microsoft.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provisioning]
+note = "Requires Azure AD app registration with Microsoft Graph permissions (Team.ReadBasic.All, Channel.ReadBasic.All, ChannelMessage.Send, Chat.ReadWrite). Admin consent required for application permissions."
